task_completion.description: Navigate to the Knowledge Base module and open the form to create a new article.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM web interface is visible, showing the 'Create' screen for a Knowledge Base article.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Title for the Knowledge Base article.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name or Title field contains exactly 'Resolving Payment Gateway Timeout Errors (Code PG-408)'.

task_completion.description: Set the Status of the article to Published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status dropdown menu is set to 'Published'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required text into the Description/Body of the article.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text editor/body field contains the issue, root cause, and resolution steps, specifically including the phrases 'Meridian payment gateway', 'API Timeout', and 'PG-408'.

task_completion.description: Save the Knowledge Base article and view the created record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the detail view (read-only mode) of the newly created Knowledge Base article in SuiteCRM, confirming it has been successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, rather than a generic text editor or local file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQL scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing MySQL commands, API curl requests, or script executions to create the article.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the article in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A success message or the transition from the 'Edit' view to the 'Detail' view of the article is visible, proving the form was submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected SuiteCRM Knowledge Base article details are: Title: 'Resolving Payment Gateway Timeout Errors (Code PG-408)', Status: 'Published', Revision: '1.0'. The article description/body must include the phrases 'Meridian payment gateway', 'PG-408', and 'API Timeout'.
